'''Lieutenant Yima''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] officer in the [[Telos Security Force]] following the [[Jedi Civil War]]. [[Dol Grenn]] assigned her to investigate how the [[Batu Rem impostor]] infiltrated the TSF.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In cut content of ''Knights of the Old Republic II'', Lieutenant Yima was supposed to be able to meet the Jedi Exile. Yima would give the Exile a quest to expose Lieutenant [[Atallo]], a corrupt TSF officer who oversaw the [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] hangar bay. The dialog from this suggests that Yima was the older dock officer of the hangar bay in which the Ebon Hawk landed in.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
